channel.title: AutoMicLock Updates
channel.description: Most recent changes with links to updates.

item.title: Version 1.1
item.description:
Version 1.1

  • Dynamic Menu Bar Icon: The icon now changes shape and color based on the lock status.
  • Smart Device Switching: Added a delay to prevent rapid audio switching loops.
  • Dynamic Appearance: App icon now adapts to Light and Dark mode.
  • Accessibility: Full VoiceOver support added.
  • Improved Stability: Various bug fixes for a smoother experience.
